name: Super Southern Fried Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into frying pieces.
2. Add salt and pepper to the chicken. Set aside for 15 minutes.
3. Mix cream, water, eggs, and beat together.
4. Pour the cream mixture over the chicken and allow it to soak for 1 hour.
5. Sprinkle paprika into flour, then roll the chicken in flour.
6. Melt bacon fat, shortening, and butter in a skillet.
7. Drop the chicken into hot grease and fry on medium heat until golden brown.
